args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE description ILIKE '%Los Angeles, CA%' OR description ILIKE '%Los Angeles, California%' OR description ILIKE '%Los Angeles%' OR name ILIKE '%Los Angeles%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE description ILIKE '%Los Angeles, CA%' OR description ILIKE '%Los Angeles, California%' OR description ILIKE '%Los Angeles%' OR name ILIKE '%Los Angeles%';

args.query:
SELECT r.gmap_id, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count
FROM review r
WHERE r.gmap_id IN ('gmap_44','gmap_41','gmap_43','gmap_38','gmap_39','gmap_42','gmap_40')
GROUP BY r.gmap_id
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT r.gmap_id, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count
FROM review r
WHERE r.gmap_id IN ('gmap_44','gmap_41','gmap_43','gmap_38','gmap_39','gmap_42','gmap_40')
GROUP BY r.gmap_id
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
biz = pd.DataFrame(var_call_uLK2JnkGPE8ODfwdnJBfuYUe)
rt = pd.DataFrame(var_call_zLw6HMuyP57SE3bwBe4qMSn5)
# ensure numeric
rt['avg_rating'] = rt['avg_rating'].astype(float)
rt['review_count'] = rt['review_count'].astype(int)
merged = rt.merge(biz[['gmap_id','name']], on='gmap_id', how='left')
merged = merged.sort_values(['avg_rating','review_count'], ascending=[False, False]).head(5)
res = merged[['name','avg_rating','review_count']].to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(res))
